institution.name: Miami Lakes Educational Center and Technical College

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Miami Lakes Educational Center and Technical College fell 45% between 2006 and 2009 (40.9% → 22.6%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Miami Lakes Educational Center and Technical College rose 33% between 2007 and 2010 ($2.6k → $3.5k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Miami Lakes Educational Center and Technical College fell 26% between 2021 and 2024 (896 → 665).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Miami Lakes Educational Center and Technical College rose 30% between 2021 and 2024 (76.9% → 100.0%).
